shared_attributes.design_principle: minimal pixel representation, clear at tiny scale

context.role: food item for Echo, appears in food bowl
context.screen_position: inside food bowl (x=16-32, y=100-112) when present
context.usage_scenario: displayed in food bowl based on food_level (0=none, 1=few, 2=many), consumed when Echo eats

visual_specification.texture: solid color, no internal detail at 3x3px

animation.description: static seed sprite, no animation, multiple instances clustered in bowl

visual_specification.details: golden orange color (#FFA300) matching Echo's body, 3x3px irregular shape, appears in clusters of 3-8 seeds in food bowl depending on food_level

relationships.shared_with: shares golden color (#FFA300) with Echo's body feathers
relationships.differences_from: smallest object in game, purely visual representation (no individual seed interaction), appears/disappears based on food_level state
